Contact Us

Campus Shuttle

Description:

The Campus Shuttle travels around campus making stops at all Residential communities as well as the Engineering Building, Decker Health Services, the East and West Gyms, the Events Center, Clearview, and Academic A.

Operation Time:

Weekdays:
The Campus Shuttle begins running at 6:30 P.M. after the last RIU shuttle. For CS service before 6:30 P.M., please refer to the RIU Schedule.


Weekends:
N/A

Notes:

Scroll below for a graphic map of this route, its schedule, and its stops with links to stop pictures and Google Maps location pins so that you can easily find your stop, and know when your bus is expected to arrive.

① Leaves Mohawk

② Susquehanna

③ Hillside

④ Mountainview

⑤ Returns to Lower Campus



To see where the Campus Shuttle is please visit ETA SPOT's Website or download the ETA SPOT app from your App Store, and select the Campus Shuttle.

① ② ③ ④ ⑤
6:30 PM 6:36 PM 6:38 PM 6:40 PM 6:43 PM
6:45 PM 6:51 PM 6:53 PM 6:55 PM 6:58 PM
7:00 PM 7:06 PM 7:08 PM 7:10 PM 7:13 PM
7:15 PM 7:21 PM 7:23 PM 7:25 PM 7:28 PM
7:30 PM 7:36 PM 7:38 PM 7:40 PM 7:43 PM
7:45 PM 7:51 PM 7:53 PM 7:55 PM 7:58 PM
8:00 PM 8:06 PM 8:08 PM 8:10 PM 8:13 PM
8:15 PM 8:21 PM 8:23 PM 8:25 PM 8:28 PM
8:30 PM 8:36 PM 8:38 PM 8:40 PM 8:43 PM

There is no weekend Campus Shuttle service available.

* = This stop will only be serviced on Weekdays when the Campus Shuttle is a Green Bus.

* = This stop will only be serviced on Weekends or when the Campus Shuttle is a Blue Bus.

Bus Stops:
Engineering Building*
Mohawk*
Decker Health Services
(By Request Only)*
Dickinson*
Newing
Couper Administration
East Gym
Welcome Center*
West Gym
McGuire / Physical Facilities
Clearview*
Susquehanna
Hillside
Mountainview
Hinman / Academic A
